faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to popular questions about the system

0.question: How do I get started with the system?
0.answer: To get started, register in the system or log in with the credentials provided by the administrator. After logging in, you will have access to features according to your role.

1.question: What user roles exist in the system?
1.answer: The system has 5 roles: Administrator (full access), Methodist (document and template management), Secretary (schedule and report work), Teacher (view schedule and students), and Student (limited viewing access).

2.question: How do I upload documents?
2.answer: Go to the "Documents" section and click the "Upload document" button. Supported formats are PDF, DOC, DOCX, XLS, XLSX. Maximum file size is 50 MB.

3.question: Can I recover deleted documents?
3.answer: Yes, all deleted documents are moved to the archive where they are stored for 30 days. During this time, they can be recovered through the "Archive" section.

4.question: How do I configure notifications?
4.answer: In the "Settings" section of your profile, you can choose notification types (email, push) and events you want to receive alerts about: new documents, approaching deadlines, schedule changes.

5.question: Is my data secure?
5.answer: Yes, we use modern encryption methods (TLS 1.3, AES-256), two-factor authentication, and regular backups. All data is stored on secure servers in compliance with legal requirements.
